name: ComboboxComponent
description:
Allows users to filter through results and select a value.

Supports Angular Forms.
```html
<fd-combobox
     [(ngModel)]="searchTerm"
     [dropdownValues]="dropdownValues"
     placeholder="Type some text...">
</fd-combobox>
```

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description: Aria-label for Combobox.

inputs.name: ariaLabelledBy
inputs.description: Aria-Labelledby for element describing Combobox.

inputs.name: autoComplete
inputs.description: Whether the autocomplete should be enabled; Enabled by default

inputs.name: buttonFocusable
inputs.description: Whether AddOn Button should be focusable

inputs.name: byline
inputs.description: Whether list item options should be rendered as byline.

inputs.name: clearButtonFocusable
inputs.description: Whether clear button should be focusable.

inputs.name: closeOnOutsideClick
inputs.description: Whether the combobox should close, when a click is performed outside its boundaries. True by default

inputs.name: closeOnSelect
inputs.description: Whether the popover should close when a user selects a result.

inputs.name: comboboxId
inputs.description: Id for the Combobox.

inputs.name: communicateByObject
inputs.description:
Defines if combobox should behave same as dropdown. When it's enabled writing inside text input won't
trigger onChange function, until it matches one of displayed dropdown values. Also communicating with combobox
can be achieved only by objects with same type as dropdownValue

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether the search input is disabled. *

inputs.name: dropDownMaxWidthPx
inputs.description: Max width of the dropdown in pixels. Default is 640px (40rem).

inputs.name: dropdownValues
inputs.description: Values to be filtered in the search input.

inputs.name: fillControlMode
inputs.description:
Preset options for the Select body width, whatever is chosen, the body has a 600px limit.
* `at-least` will apply a minimum width to the body equivalent to the width of the control. - Default
* `equal` will apply a width to the body equivalent to the width of the control.
* 'fit-content' will apply width needed to properly display items inside, independent of control.

inputs.name: fillOnSelect
inputs.description: Whether the input field should be populated with the result picked by the user.

inputs.name: glyph
inputs.description: Icon to display in the right-side button.

inputs.name: glyphFont
inputs.description: Glyph font family

inputs.name: groupFn
inputs.description: Function used to handle grouping of items.

inputs.name: highlighting
inputs.description: Whether the matching string should be highlighted during filtration.

inputs.name: includes
inputs.description:
Whether to return results where the input matches the entire string. By default, only results that start
with the input search term will be returned.

inputs.name: inputId
inputs.description: Id attribute for input element inside Combobox component

inputs.name: isSearch
inputs.description: Whether the Combobox is a Search Field

inputs.name: itemTemplate
inputs.description:
The template with which to display the individual listed items.
Use it by passing an ng-template with implicit content. See examples for more info.

inputs.name: maxHeight
inputs.description: Max height of the popover. Any overflowing elements will be accessible through scrolling.

inputs.name: mobile
inputs.description: Whether the combobox should be built on mobile mode

inputs.name: mobileConfig
inputs.description: Multi Input Mobile Configuration, it's applied only, when mobile is enabled

inputs.name: noDropDownMaxWidth
inputs.description:
Whether the dropdown should have max width.
Set to true if you want the dropdown to take the width of the control.
Default is false

inputs.name: openOnKeyboardEvent
inputs.description: Whether the combobox should open, when any key is pressed in input (except Escape, Space, Enter). True by default

inputs.name: placeholder
inputs.description: Placeholder of the search input. *

inputs.name: readOnly
inputs.description: Whether the combobox is readonly.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description: If it is mandatory field

inputs.name: showClearButton
inputs.description: Whether to show the clear search term button

inputs.name: showDropdownButton
inputs.description: Whether to display the addon button.

inputs.name: state
inputs.description:
The state of the form control - applies css classes.
 Can be `success`, `error`, `warning`, `information` or blank for default.

inputs.name: tabOutStrategy
inputs.description:
Action to perform when user shifts focus from the dropdown.
- `close` will close the dropdown preserving previously selected value.
- `closeAndSelect` will close the dropdown and select last focused dropdown item.

inputs.name: title
inputs.description: The tooltip for the multi-input icon.

inputs.name: triggers
inputs.description:
The trigger events that will open/close the options popover.
 Accepts any [HTML DOM Events](https://www.w3schools.com/jsref/dom_obj_event.asp).

inputs.name: valueProperty
inputs.description:
When communicateByObject is true, specifies which property of the selected object
should be used as the form control value. If not specified, the entire object is returned.
Example: if dropdownValues = [{ displayedValue: 'Apple', code: 'A1' }] and valueProperty = 'code',
the form control value will be 'A1' instead of the entire object.

inputs.name: width
inputs.description: Custom width of the control.

outputs.name: inputTextChange
outputs.description: Event emitted when the input text changes.

outputs.name: itemClicked
outputs.description: Event emitted when an item is clicked. Use *$event* to retrieve it.

outputs.name: openChange
outputs.description: Event emitted, when the combobox's popover body is opened or closed

methods.name: dialogApprove
methods.description: Handle dialog approval, closes popover and propagates data changes.

methods.name: dialogDismiss
methods.description: Handle dialog dismissing, closes popover and sets backup data.

methods.name: handleAutoComplete
methods.description: Method that handles complete event from auto complete directive, setting the new value, and closing popover
